name: Memory Note
description: Write durable, well-structured markdown memory notes about your work, organised in virtual folders. Cross-reference other notes with [[Wikilinks]] and topics with #hashtags — these build a navigable knowledge graph. Use action='write' to create/overwrite a note at a path, 'append' to add to one, 'read' to fetch a note, 'list' to browse.

args.name: path
args.description: Virtual folder path incl. filename, e.g. 'research/auth-spike.md'. Defaults to a slug of the title.

args.name: body
args.description: Markdown body. Use [[Other Note]] to link notes and #tags for topics. Required for write/append.

args.name: tags
args.description: Extra topic tags (merged with #hashtags found in the body).

args.name: folder
args.description: list: restrict to a folder prefix.

args.name: tag
args.description: list: restrict to notes carrying this tag.
